examples.description: Layer-based post-processing effects: gaussian blur, noise, and path mask applied as a complete visual effect chain
Animated image mask using a path to clip a loaded image to a rounded rectangle shape with timer-driven animation
Drop shadow on text by drawing a coloured version first, applying addDropShadowFromAlpha, then drawing the final text on top

examples.description: Per-corner border radius using the object syntax for fillRoundedRectangle, rounding only the top two corners
Complete custom rotary slider LAF function using arc path, rotation, and line drawing to render a knob with a value indicator
Basic shape drawing in a paint routine: ellipses, triangle, and line using raw ARGB colour values
Real-time MIDI controller visualizer (modwheel and pitchwheel) updated from onController, with deferred callbacks
Scrolling text animation using a timer to shift a yOffset each tick and trigger repaint
